magazines.Vogue: High-contrast, dramatic lighting, luxury storytelling, sharp focus on texture.
magazines.Kinfolk: Soft natural light, muted palettes, minimalist composition, intentional imperfections.
magazines.Architectural Digest: Symmetrical perspective, deep depth of field, wide-angle clarity, natural-meets-artificial light.
magazines.National Geographic: Saturated natural colors, raw textures, environmental storytelling, telephoto compression.

photographers.name: Peter Lindbergh
photographers.style: B&W, raw emotional realism, cinematic grain.

photographers.name: Annie Leibovitz
photographers.style: Painterly lighting, complex staged compositions, rich color depth.

photographers.name: Helmut Newton
photographers.style: Strong shadows, provocative brutalism, metallic reflections.

photographers.name: Fan Ho
photographers.style: Geometry of shadows, street realism, ethereal light beams.

gear_lore.Phase One XF IQ4: 150MP ultra-detail, maximum dynamic range, commercial crispness.
gear_lore.Leica M11: Organic warmth, signature color rendering, classic street look.
gear_lore.Hasselblad V-System: Square format, soft focus fall-off, vintage film aesthetic (Kodak Portra).
